prompt:
Design a breathtaking, premium AI CEO command dashboard called "FLOWZINT AI" for a PP woven box manufacturing company in Surat, Gujarat. This is the MAIN interface the CEO uses daily — it must be stunning, intuitive, and make the CEO feel like they're piloting a starship.

CORE CONCEPT: "Command Bridge" — the CEO sits at the center, surrounded by live intelligence. Every pixel should feel premium, intentional, and alive with real-time data.

COLOR SYSTEM (use exactly):
- Background: Deep void #0a0a0f with subtle radial cyan/violet gradient overlays
- Primary AI accent: Cyan #55e6ff (glows, active states, AI elements, borders)
- Secondary knowledge accent: Violet #8b5cf6 (Guru AI, memory, intelligence)
- Success: Emerald #38ef7d (revenue, online, production running)
- Warning: Amber #f59e0b (pending, pipeline, needs attention)
- Danger: Red #ef4444 (escalations, blocked, urgent)
- Glass cards: rgba(255,255,255,0.04) background, 1px border rgba(255,255,255,0.1), backdrop-blur-xl

LAYOUT: Three-column, full height (100vh), no scroll. Desktop 1440x900.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

LEFT COLUMN (320px) — WhatsApp Live Chat Hub:
Header: "Customer Chats" with "ChakraHQ · Live" badge (green pulsing dot). Search bar below.

Beneath search: Scrollable list of 8 live WhatsApp conversations. Each row shows:
- Circular avatar with customer initials (gradient background cyan→violet)
- Green dot on avatar if conversation is OPEN/active
- Customer name (bold, white)
- Phone number below (small, slate-400)
- Latest message preview (truncated, 1 line)
- Time stamp (right-aligned, tiny)
- If message is INBOUND → slate-300 text. If OUTBOUND → cyan "↩" prefix
- Selected chat gets cyan left border + subtle cyan background tint
- Unread chats get a small cyan dot badge

Bottom of left column: "Ravi AI" agent pill — green pulsing dot, "Ravi AI active" text. Small toggle switches: "Auto Reply ON/OFF", "Agent ON/OFF"

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

CENTER COLUMN (flex-1) — Main Workspace:

When NO chat is selected, show the Command Center:

TOP ROW: 6 KPI cards in a horizontal strip:
- "Active Chats" (12) — MessageCircle icon, cyan accent
- "Quotes Today" (5, ₹2.8L) — FileText icon, violet accent
- "Production" (67%) — Gauge icon, emerald accent
- "Revenue Pipeline" (₹8.5L) — Indian Rupee icon, amber accent
- "Knowledge Nodes" (128) — Brain icon, cyan accent
- "Pending Inputs" (3) — AlertTriangle icon, red accent

Each KPI card: frosted glass, rounded-2xl, subtle top-down gradient border (brighter at top edge), hover: subtle cyan glow

MIDDLE ROW: Production Health chart — area chart showing 7-day factory load. Booked = violet gradient fill, Available = emerald dashed line. Dark chart grid, glowing data points.

BOTTOM ROW: Orders Pipeline kanban — 5 horizontal stages: Enquiry → Quoting → Confirmed → Production → Complete. Each column shows count + preview card.

When a chat IS selected: Show the WhatsApp conversation view:
- Header: Back button, customer avatar, name, phone, "OPEN" status with green dot, "Ravi AI active" pill
- Message area: Chat bubbles. INBOUND (customer): left-aligned, glass card style, rounded-2xl with rounded-tl-sm. OUTBOUND (owner reply): right-aligned, cyan-violet gradient background, rounded-2xl with rounded-tr-sm, subtle glow.
- System messages centered: small glass pills with timestamp
- Auto-scroll to latest message
- Bottom: Reply input bar — glass input with "Reply via WhatsApp (Enter to send)..." placeholder, Send button with cyan gradient

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

RIGHT COLUMN (320px) — AI Intelligence Panel:
Header: "AI Intelligence" with emerald "Alive" badge (pulsing)

Three glass cards stacked vertically:

1. "Live AI State" — cyan left border accent
   - "Ravi analyzing customer intent" with Zap icon
   - "Deterministic backend blocking price response"
   - "Production capacity: 67% available"
   - Small animated dots showing thinking state

2. "Recent Activity" — violet left border accent
   - Streaming event list (5 items):
   - "Ravi replied to Nikhil" (cyan dot, 2m ago)
   - "Quote generated ₹83.5K" (violet dot, 8m ago)
   - "Production started Order #8" (emerald dot, 15m ago)
   - "Escalation: Nikhil needs menu" (red dot, 22m ago)
   - "Payment confirmed ₹1.64L" (emerald dot, 1h ago)

3. "AI Memory Events" — emerald/amber left border
   - 4 knowledge node mini-cards:
   - "meter_weight:36:3.5:unlam = 148 g/m" (green customer_visible badge)
   - "delivery_patna = 3 days" (green badge)
   - "owner_tone = casual Hinglish" (amber internal_only badge)
   - "min_order = 500 kg" (green badge)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

AMBIENT EFFECTS:
- Subtle floating particles (small cyan dots drifting slowly)
- Background radial gradients that shift subtly
- Cards have subtle hover states (slight y-lift + glow increase)
- Active AI elements pulse gently

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Headings: Inter, bold, white
- Body: Inter, regular, slate-300
- Data/numbers: JetBrains Mono, tabular-nums for alignment
- Labels: uppercase, letter-spacing, slate-500
- Indian Rupee symbol (₹) for all currency

Make this feel like the most premium, cutting-edge AI command interface ever designed. Every detail matters. The WhatsApp chat monitoring should feel native and seamless — not bolted on.

DEVICE: Desktop 1440x900
